verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I can see the tears in your eyes I can hear the depths of your cry Faint not, My grace Is sufficient for thee

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: All that I AM All that I WAS All that I WILL BE's Because of you All that I have All that I own All that I possess I've given you For you are My beloved Bride

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Fear not, I'm always with thee Your comfort and strength to bear thee Just run the race The rest is MINE to do

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I know your work, Your faith and your trials You try to live the life to make me smile Come now rejoice Arise, your light has shone!

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I have a house that I never built Abounding grace that I never merit A holy life that I cannot live Victorious days that I have never won

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: All that I am All that I was All that I will be's Because of You All that I have All that You give Where could I go now But just to You For you have the Words of Life
